{{Concept | Name=Enemies Breaking Down Doors | Guid=3015-13601 | Deck=It is a very common concept in horror-themed video games. If the enemy does not break in through the window, then wait for him through the door | Characters=Characters/Chris_Walker | Concepts=Concepts/Jump_Scare_Moment,Concepts/Serial_Killer,Concepts/Survival_Horror,Concepts/Window_Breaking_Enemies,Concepts/Zombie | Franchises= | Games=Games/Call_of_Cthulhu_Dark_Corners_of_the_Earth,Games/Cold_Winter,Games/Condemned_Criminal_Origins,Games/Contract_J_A_C_K,Games/Enclave,Games/F_E_A_R_First_Encounter_Assault_Recon,Games/Gears_of_War,Games/Left_4_Dead,Games/Left_4_Dead_2,Games/Lone_Survivor,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_3_Snake_Eater,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_3_Subsistence,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_D_Snake_Eater,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_HD_Collection,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Master_Collection_Vol_1,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Snake_Eater_3D,Games/Minecraft,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_II,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_Sigma_2,Games/Outlast,Games/Outlast_2,Games/Outlast_Trinity,Games/Resident_Evil_3_Nemesis,Games/Resident_Evil_4,Games/Resident_Evil_4_2023,Games/Resident_Evil_Survivor,Games/Shadowgrounds | Locations=Locations/Mansion | Objects=Objects/Axe,Objects/Building,Objects/Door,Objects/Elevator | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3785934-enemiesbreakingdowndoors.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3785934-enemiesbreakingdowndoors.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_tiny,square_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Not to be confused with enemies who can follow us from room to room just by opening the door. They must knock it out with a foot, an axe, or explosives so that it shatters into splinters and ceases to exist, hangs crookedly with a dent, or is shot through in the area of the lock. Doors are defined as any shifting structure that serves to ensure security or privacy: wooden doors between rooms, Asian paper doors, metal street doors, elevator doors, car doors.

{{Concept | Name=Evo 2024 | Guid=3015-13241 | Deck=The Evo 2024 world championships took place July 19-21, 2024 at the Las Vegas Convention Center in Las Vegas, Nevada. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Evo_Championship_Series | Franchises= | Games=Games/Granblue_Fantasy_Versus_Rising,Games/Guilty_Gear_Strive,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Street_Fighter_6,Games/Street_Fighter_III_3rd_Strike,Games/Tekken_8,Games/The_King_of_Fighters_XV,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_II_Sys_Celes | Locations=Locations/Las_Vegas,Locations/Nevada,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3604125-untitled-2.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3604125-untitled-2.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_small,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick,square_tiny,scale_tiny","caption":""},"background":{"file":"3604384-img_2413.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"screen_kubrick_wide,screen_kubrick,ignore_jpg_scale_super,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_tiny","caption":""}}' />
==Overview==
{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3604453-untitled-110.20.07%E2%80%AFam.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3604453-untitled-110.20.07%E2%80%AFam.png|align=right|width=320}} The 2024 edition of the [[Concepts/Evo_Championship_Series|Evo World Championships]] was the biggest the event has ever been in every way. Over 10,000 different players registered for tournaments, attendance was higher than ever before, and the event moved to the brand new West Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center, which allowed for a much larger expo area including a massive arcade and dozens of vendors in artists alley.
==Official Tournaments==
===[[Games/Street_Fighter_6|Street Fighter 6]]=== # FLY | Punk ([[Characters/Cammy|Cammy]]) # NASR | BigBird ([[Characters/Rashid|Rashid]]) # Mouz | EndingWalker ([[Characters/Ed_34965|Ed]])
===[[Games/Tekken_8|Tekken 8]]=== # TM | Arslan Ash ([[Characters/Nina_Williams|Nina Williams]]) # Falcons | Atif ([[Characters/Sergei_Dragunov|Sergei Dragunov]], [[Characters/Feng_Wei|Feng Wei]]) # Yamasa | Nobi (Sergei Dragunov)
===[[Games/Guilty_Gear_Strive|Guilty Gear -Strive-]]=== # FLY | Nitro ([[Characters/Jack_O|Jack-O]], [[Characters/Giovanna|Giovanna]]) # RTE | Tatuma ([[Characters/Sol_Badguy|Sol Badguy]]) # RedDitto ([[Characters/Ramlethal_Valentine|Ramlethal Valentine]])
===[[Games/Granblue_Fantasy_Versus_Rising|Granblue Fantasy: Versus Rising]]=== # PAR | Aarondamac ([[Characters/Belial_40469|Belial]]) # IBSG | Tororo ([[Characters/Percival|Percival]], [[Characters/Siegfried_40481|Siegfried]]) # PAR | Kojicoco ([[Characters/Nier_55106|Nier]])
===[[Games/Street_Fighter_III_3rd_Strike|Street Fighter III: 3rd Strike]]=== # MOV ([[Characters/Chun_Li|Chun-Li]], [[Characters/Elena_3106|Elena]], [[Characters/Ken_Masters|Ken]]) # Issei ([[Characters/Yun|Yun]]) # Chi-Rithy (Chun-Li)
===[[Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_II_Sys_Celes|Under Night In-Birth II: Sys:Celes]]=== # Senaru (Eltnum) # Mo.Sin ([[Characters/Kuon|Kuon]]) # Notes ([[Characters/Carmine|Carmine]])
===[[Games/Mortal_Kombat_1|Mortal Kombat 1]]=== # SonicFox ([[Characters/The_Homelander|Homelander]], [[Characters/Johnny_Cage|Johnny Cage]], [[Characters/Sindel|Sindel]]) # T7G | Nicolas (Johnny Cage, [[Characters/Baraka|Baraka]], [[Characters/Rain|Rain]]) # T7G | Zeeus ([[Characters/Ashrah|Ashrah]])
===[[Games/The_King_of_Fighters_XV|The King of Fighters XV]]=== # VSPO | Xiaohai ([[Characters/Geese_Howard|Geese]], [[Characters/Benimaru_Nikaido|Benimaru]], [[Characters/Isla|Isla]] - [[Characters/Kyo_Kusanagi|Kyo]], Benimaru, Isla) # XG | E.T. (Geese, Benimaru, Isla - [[Characters/Clark_Steel|Clark]], Geese, Isla) # TMG | Tamago ([[Characters/Blue_Mary|Blue Mary]], [[Characters/Rock_Howard|Rock]], Benimaru - Benimaru, [[Characters/Ryo_Sakazaki|Ryo]], Rock)

revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Evo 2025 | Guid=3015-13400 | Deck=The Evo 2025 world championships took place August 1-3, 2025 at the Las Vegas Convention Center in Las Vegas, Nevada. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Evo_Championship_Series | Franchises= | Games=Games/Fatal_Fury_City_of_the_Wolves,Games/Granblue_Fantasy_Versus_Rising,Games/Guilty_Gear_Strive,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_2_New_Age_of_Heroes,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Street_Fighter_6,Games/Tekken_8,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_II_Sys_Celes | Locations=Locations/Las_Vegas,Locations/Nevada,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3604125-untitled-2.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3604125-untitled-2.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_small,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick,square_tiny,scale_tiny","caption":""},"background":{"file":"3781359-img_53132.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,screen_kubrick_wide,screen_kubrick,scale_tiny","caption":""}}' />
==Overview==
{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3775460-8038646717-ADKq_Na1T_f76_kM9OvPjmtU04nqvzQGLd7SR8jEJNgiRr98rpat16VWQmbNKxP9YL2mac_16l6DAwUEetgS8c7cfV94K6fB2oCwxGCFFPthPKLgErZLSbT0Rz-fuSzfFo0LCl9qeePX0x_G6iFpTPiWyPya5f4sU_2IV2k%3Ds0-d-e1-ft.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3775460-8038646717-ADKq_Na1T_f76_kM9OvPjmtU04nqvzQGLd7SR8jEJNgiRr98rpat16VWQmbNKxP9YL2mac_16l6DAwUEetgS8c7cfV94K6fB2oCwxGCFFPthPKLgErZLSbT0Rz-fuSzfFo0LCl9qeePX0x_G6iFpTPiWyPya5f4sU_2IV2k%3Ds0-d-e1-ft.png|align=right|width=320}} The 2025 edition of the [https://www.giantbomb.com/evo-championship-series/3015-7054 Evo World Championships] returned to the Las Vegas Convention Center's West Hall with some adjustments due to various issues that occurred during the event's first year at the venue in 2024. Most notably, access to the arena finals on Sunday required a separate badge/ticket, which cost an additional $30. This guaranteed the purchaser a seat in the arena rather than having to wait in a line for several hours outside hoping a spot would open up.
===Registration=== After a record breaking year in 2024 where over 10,000 different players registered to compete, signups were down across the board in 2025. All six returning tournament games had fewer players including 1000 fewer for Street Fighter, 2000 fewer for Tekken, and 500 fewer for Guilty Gear.

{{Concept |Guid=3015-13387 |Name=Game Developers Choice Awards 2025 |Aliases=GDC Awards 2025 |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3358139-1287946347-GDCA2.jpg |Deck=The 25th annual Game Developers Choice Awards celebrate the best games of 2024. |Games=Games/Astro_Bot, Games/Balatro, Games/Black_Myth_Wukong, Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth, Games/Life_is_Strange_Double_Exposure, Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio }} ==Overview== The twenty-fifth annual [https://www.giantbomb.com/game-developers-choice-awards/3015-4409 Choice Awards] was held on March 19, 2024 during the [https://www.giantbomb.com/game-developers-conference/3015-6699 Game Developers Conference] at the Moscone Center in [https://www.giantbomb.com/san-francisco/3035-191 San Francisco], [https://www.giantbomb.com/california/3035-1719 California].
==Personal Awards==
===Lifetime Achievement Award=== * [[People/Sami_Jarvi|Sam Lake]]
===Pioneer Award=== * [[People/Lucas_Pope|Lucas Pope]]
==Game of the Year==
{| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Balatro|Balatro]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/LocalThunk|LocalThunk]] * Publisher: [[Companies/PlayStack|PlayStack]]
====Nominees==== * [[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]] ([[Companies/Team_Asobi|Team Asobi]] / [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|SIEA]]) * [[Games/Black_Myth_Wukong|Black Myth: Wukong]] ([[Companies/Game_Science_Studio|Game Science Studio]]) * [[Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth|Final Fantasy VII Rebirth]] ([[Companies/Square_Enix|Square Enix]]) * [[Games/Helldivers_II|Helldivers II]] ([[Companies/Arrowhead_Game_Studios|Arrowhead Game Studios]] / SIEA) * [[Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio|Metaphor: ReFantazio]] ([[Companies/Studio_Zero|Studio Zero]] / [[Companies/Sega|Sega]])

{{Concept |Guid=49cb6aff-0077-4f2c-ba07-3341a09de8f3 |Name=Game Developers Choice Awards 2026 |Aliases=GDC Awards 2026 |Image=https://origin.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3358139-1287946347-GDCA2.jpg |Deck=The 26th annual Game Developers Choice Awards celebrate the best games of 2025. |Concepts=Concepts/D I C E Awards, Concepts/Game Developers Choice Awards, Concepts/29th Annual D I C E Awards, Concepts/Giant Bomb Game of the Year 2025 |Locations=Locations/San Francisco, Locations/California, Locations/The United States of America |Games=Games/Clair Obscur Expedition 33, Games/Blue Prince, Games/Death Stranding 2 On the Beach, Games/Consume Me, Games/And Roger }} ==Overview== The twenty-sixth annual [https://www.giantbomb.com/game-developers-choice-awards/3015-4409 Choice Awards] was held on March 12, 2026 during the [https://www.giantbomb.com/game-developers-conference/3015-6699 Game Developers Conference] at the Moscone Center in [https://www.giantbomb.com/san-francisco/3035-191 San Francisco], [https://www.giantbomb.com/california/3035-1719 California]. The show was hosted by Sam Maggs.

===Lifetime Achievement Award=== * [[People/Don L Daglow]]
===Ambassador Award=== * [[People/Rebecca Ann Heineman]]

page.title: Concepts/Giant Bomb Game of the Year 2024

revision.comment: Restore image alignment, sizes and captions from legacy source (3015-13360)
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Giant Bomb Game of the Year 2024 | Guid=3015-13360 | Aliases=Giant Bomb GOTY 2024,GB GOTY 2024 | Deck=The seventeenth annual Game of the Year awards from Giant Bomb. | Characters=Characters/Heismay_Noctule,Characters/Taneo_Tanamatsuri | Concepts=Concepts/28th_Annual_D_I_C_E_Awards,Concepts/Giant_Bomb_Game_of_the_Year_Awards,Concepts/The_Game_Awards_2024 | Franchises= | Games=Games/Astro_Bot,Games/Batman_Arkham_Shadow,Games/Call_of_Duty_Black_Ops_6,Games/Concord,Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth,Games/Frostpunk_2,Games/Hades_II,Games/Incredible_Crisis,Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle,Games/Legacy_of_Kain_Soul_Reaver_1_And_2_Remastered,Games/Lethal_Company,Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio,Games/Paper_Mario_The_Thousand_Year_Door_2024,Games/Persona_3_Reload,Games/Prince_of_Persia_The_Lost_Crown,Games/Senuas_Saga_Hellblade_II,Games/Silent_Hill_2_2024,Games/Star_Wars_Outlaws,Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3520254-asdf.png}}
==Overview== [https://www.giantbomb.com/giant-bomb-game-of-the-year-awards/3015-10012 Giant Bomb's Game of the Year Awards] celebrates 2024's best and worst in the world of video games. ==Deliberations== {{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_medium/0/1992/3672916-giant-bomb-stick-em-up.gif|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3672916-giant-bomb-stick-em-up.gif|align=right|width=480}} This year, the first three days were for random categories of awards while the fourth day determined the final Top 10 list. After two years of deciding GOTY based on "Eurovision-style" math, the team returned to the open debate format of years' past. * Day One - [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-1/2970-23242/free-podcast Podcast] / [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-1/2970-23242/free-video Video] * Day Two - [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-2/2970-23243/free-podcast Podcast] / [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-2/2970-23243/free-video Video] * Day Three - [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-3/2970-23245/free-podcast Podcast] / [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-3/2970-23245/free-video Video] * Day Four - [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-4/2970-23246/free-podcast Podcast] / [https://www.giantbomb.com/shows/giant-bombs-game-of-the-year-2024-day-4/2970-23246/free-video Video] ==The Awards== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Game of the Year=== # [[Games/Prince_of_Persia_The_Lost_Crown|Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown]] # [[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]] # [[Games/Balatro|Balatro]] # [[Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle|Indiana Jones and the Great Circle]] # [[Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio|Metaphor: ReFantazio]] # [[Games/Elden_Ring|Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree]] # [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]] # [[Games/Silent_Hill_2_2024|Silent Hill 2]] # [[Games/Persona_3_Reload|Persona 3 Reload]] # [[Games/Call_of_Duty_Black_Ops_6|Call of Duty: Black Ops 6]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/16/164924/3537372-6379034569-94303.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/16/164924/3537372-6379034569-94303.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Hole=== * [[Games/Silent_Hill_2_2024|Silent Hill 2]]'s Wall Hole

'''Runners-Up'''

* The Hole in [[Characters/Aerith_Gainsborough|Aerith]]'s Body at the End of [[Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth|Final Fantasy VII Rebirth]] * The Weiner Hole in the Fence in [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3633339-wjd8sy87zp3xuncctorulr5f.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3633339-wjd8sy87zp3xuncctorulr5f.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Walkin' Around=== * [[Games/Star_Wars_Outlaws|Star Wars Outlaws]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]] * [[Games/Pools|Pools]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3568490-1141965082-EGST_StorePortrait_1200x1600_1200x1600-e6f41420c20529e7380243a6f6b7a38f.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3568490-1141965082-EGST_StorePortrait_1200x1600_1200x1600-e6f41420c20529e7380243a6f6b7a38f.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Old Game=== * [[Games/Paper_Mario_The_Thousand_Year_Door_2024|Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Dragon_Age_Origins|Dragon Age: Origins]] * [[Games/Persona_3_Reload|Persona 3 Reload]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3581050-4614242570-hero_.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3581050-4614242570-hero_.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Bot in Astro Bot=== * [[Characters/Taneo_Tanamatsuri|Taneo Tanamatsuri]] from [[Games/Incredible_Crisis|Incredible Crisis]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Characters/Lady_Maria_of_the_Astral_Clocktower|Lady Maria of the Astral Clocktower]] from [[Games/Bloodborne|Bloodborne]] * [[Characters/Amaterasu|Amaterasu]] from [[Games/Okami|Ōkami]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3669532-7718283924-ASTRO.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3669532-7718283924-ASTRO.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Map=== * Stakeout from [[Games/Call_of_Duty_Black_Ops_6|Call of Duty: Black Ops 6]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Silent_Hill_2_2024|Silent Hill 2]] * [[Games/Dragon_Quest_III_HD_2D_Remake|Dragon Quest III HD-2D Remake]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3642005-apps.10491.14346543607136639.d932bf87-6edc-4da6-bbd5-c944ad33bc0d.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3642005-apps.10491.14346543607136639.d932bf87-6edc-4da6-bbd5-c944ad33bc0d.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Biggest Miss=== * [[Games/Concord|Concord]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* Bakalar's High Five to Mike||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3584679-7289095896-5d434.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3584679-7289095896-5d434.png|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Most Satisfying Thing!=== * Lighting Torches in [[Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle|Indiana Jones and the Great Circle]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* Lots of Little Bits in Astro Bot * Crackin' Packs in [[Games/Pokemon_Trading_Card_Game_Pocket|Pokémon Trading Card Game Pocket]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3539981-3923301993-apps.394.14050533476382116.9ce9be62-6690-4c40-8e76-7e5af2a256fb.23519966-541f-46af-94a3-68d956e7cf85.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3539981-3923301993-apps.394.14050533476382116.9ce9be62-6690-4c40-8e76-7e5af2a256fb.23519966-541f-46af-94a3-68d956e7cf85.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Button=== * Left Mouse Click on [[Platforms/PC|PC]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* Back Button on [[Accessories/DualSense_Edge|DualSense Edge]] * X Button on [[Accessories/Xbox_Series_X_S_Controller|Xbox Series X|S Controller]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3669852-4879695549-3-Tas.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3669852-4879695549-3-Tas.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Input=== *

8Bitdo Ultimate 2.4G Wireless Controller, Hall Effect Joystick Update, Gaming Controller with Charging Dock for PC, Android, Steam Deck & Apple

'''Runners-Up'''

* N/A||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3672123-6878046500-61l9t.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3672123-6878046500-61l9t.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Hitting=== * [[Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle|Indiana Jones and the Great Circle]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Tekken_8|Tekken 8]] * [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3539981-3923301993-apps.394.14050533476382116.9ce9be62-6690-4c40-8e76-7e5af2a256fb.23519966-541f-46af-94a3-68d956e7cf85.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3539981-3923301993-apps.394.14050533476382116.9ce9be62-6690-4c40-8e76-7e5af2a256fb.23519966-541f-46af-94a3-68d956e7cf85.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best VR Game=== * [[Games/Batman_Arkham_Shadow|Batman: Arkham Shadow]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* n/a * n/a||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3573686-1954201070-39035.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3573686-1954201070-39035.png|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Game We Streamed=== * [[Games/Lethal_Company|Lethal Company]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Alone_in_the_Dark_2008|Alone in the Dark]] * [[Games/Days_Gone|Days Gone]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3518893-4397218415-libra.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3518893-4397218415-libra.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Depressing Game=== * [[Games/Persona_3_Reload|Persona 3 Reload]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Mouthwashing|Mouthwashing]] * [[Games/Silent_Hill_2_2024|Silent Hill 2]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3546417-3706637110-co6z1.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3546417-3706637110-co6z1.png|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Moment or Sequence=== * Going Up in [[Games/Hades_II|Hades II]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* Musical Montage in [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]] * Hopping on a griffon, flying across the map, then falling thousands of feet, and then getting saved by your special boy in [[Games/Dragons_Dogma_II|Dragon's Dogma II]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3595319-9538223957-hades.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3595319-9538223957-hades.png|align=right|width=320}}

|} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Oppressive Game=== * [[Games/Frostpunk_2|Frostpunk 2]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Games/Concord|Concord]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3538981-2374725999-libra.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3538981-2374725999-libra.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best New Character=== * [[Characters/Heismay_Noctule|Heismay Noctule]] from [[Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio|Metaphor: ReFantazio]]

'''Runners-Up'''

* [[Characters/Reina_52200|Reina]] from [[Games/Tekken_8|Tekken 8]] * Big Ron from [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]]||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3672066-9957987447-01j9p2013f2jrkymcv1d.webp.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3672066-9957987447-01j9p2013f2jrkymcv1d.webp.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===Best Compilation or Collection=== * [[Games/Legacy_of_Kain_Soul_Reaver_1_And_2_Remastered|Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver 1 andamp;amp;amp;amp; 2 Remastered]]

'''Runners-Up'''

{{Concept | Name=Global Network Failure | Guid=3015-13242 | Deck=This theme revolves around a large-scale crisis stemming from failures in computer networks and digital infrastructure. Unlike scenarios involving intentional sabotage, conspiracy or malevolent AI, the crisis in these stories is caused by human error, oversight, or systemic negligence. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/179/1792700/3602753-default_a_malfunction_in_serverroom_smoke_red_alert_electric_c_0.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3602753-default_a_malfunction_in_serverroom_smoke_red_alert_electric_c_0.jpg","path":"179\/1792700\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,screen_kubrick,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> This theme revolves around a large-scale crisis stemming from failures in computer networks and digital infrastructure. Unlike scenarios involving intentional sabotage, conspiracy or malevolent AI, the crisis in these stories is caused by human error, oversight, or systemic negligence.

{{Concept | Name=Golden Retriever | Guid=3015-13416 | Deck=A Scottish breed of dog. | Characters=Characters/Decker_57662,Characters/Goldie_40730,Characters/Otis_57657,Characters/Pompompurin | Concepts=Concepts/Dog | Franchises= | Games=Games/Days_Gone,Games/Hello_Kitty_Island_Adventure,Games/Pompompurin_Korokoro_Daibouken,Games/Shin_Minna_no_Nurie_Pompompurin | Locations=Locations/Scotland,Locations/United_Kingdom | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3703583-1201800992-220px.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3703583-1201800992-220px.jpg","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_super,scale_small,screen_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A Scottish breed of dog.

{{Concept | Name=Golden Snidget | Guid=3015-13647 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Hogwarts_Legacy | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Goldfish Scooping | Guid=3015-13473 | Deck=A traditional Japanese festival game, also known as "kingyo-sukui", where players scoop goldfish from a pool, usually with a small "poi" net (which breaks easily). | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Catch_Em_Goldfish_Scooping,Games/PlayStation_Home,Games/Scoop_it_Goldfish,Games/Werewolf_Goldfish | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> One of the most well-known Japanese arcade medal games is the 2008 Sega game ''Kids Yataimura Kingyosukui'' (キッズ屋台村 金魚すくい), which is on a large cocktail-style cabinet (other than the "Single" version, which is upright on a kids medal cabinet).

{{Concept | Name=Goriyas | Guid=3015-13379 | Deck=Goiyas are a common enemy in The Legend of Zelda series.
